name: Freeman Motor Showroom | Portland
description_short: Freeman Motor Company is a used car dealership with Portland and Salem, OR locations offering vehicle sales, dealer financing, trade-ins, service, and collision repair.
description_long:
Freeman Motor Company is an Oregon-based used car dealership operating two physical showrooms — one in Portland (7524 S Macadam Ave) and one in Salem (3784 Portland Rd NE). The company positions itself as a full-service automotive retail operation rather than a traditional lender, but it does facilitate vehicle financing through a credit application process and an online payment calculator. Both locations maintain extended retail hours, including Sundays, and the business offers bilingual service in English and Spanish.

Freeman Motor's core offering is the sale of used vehicles across both showrooms. Beyond vehicle sales, the company provides a credit application for dealer-arranged financing, a payment calculator to estimate monthly costs, and a warranty program. For consumers who already own a vehicle, Freeman offers trade-in valuation, outright vehicle purchase ('Sell My Car'), and a consignment program allowing owners to list their car through the dealership. An out-of-state buyer program is also available for remote purchasers.

What distinguishes Freeman Motor from a typical used car lot is its emphasis on a curated in-store experience. The company runs branded events such as 'Cars & Kicks' and a 'Sip & Spin Passport' program, suggesting a lifestyle-oriented brand identity. The dealership also operates an AutoSpa (detailing), an in-house repair and maintenance center, and a collision repair facility — making it one of the more vertically integrated independent used car operations in the Portland metro area. Bilingual (English/Spanish) support is explicitly offered.

For CreditDoc users seeking a financial institution or direct lender, Freeman Motor Company is a poor fit — it is a car dealership that facilitates auto financing, not a personal loan provider. Financing is arranged through third-party lenders whose rates, terms, and credit requirements are not disclosed on the website. Consumers with credit challenges should treat the credit application as a starting point and compare financing offers elsewhere before committing. This listing is most relevant to consumers who need vehicle financing bundled with a vehicle purchase, not standalone personal loan products.
pros: Two physical Oregon locations — Portland (S Macadam Ave) and Salem (Portland Rd NE) — with in-person sales staff
Bilingual English/Spanish service explicitly offered via language toggle on site
Extended hours including Sundays (12–6 PM both locations) and Saturdays
Full-service operation under one roof: sales, repair/maintenance, AutoSpa, and collision repair
Consignment program lets owners list their vehicle without selling outright
Out-of-state buyer program supports remote purchasers not local to Oregon
Branded lifestyle events (Cars & Kicks, Sip & Spin Passport) suggest customer-experience focus beyond transactional sales
cons: Not a direct lender — financing is dealer-arranged through third parties; rates and approval criteria are not disclosed on the website
Portland service center is closed Saturdays and Sundays; Salem service is open Saturdays but hours not confirmed for Sunday
Used vehicles only — no new-car inventory mentioned
Geographic coverage is limited to Portland and Salem metro areas in Oregon
No financing rate ranges, credit score minimums, or loan terms are published, making pre-qualification comparison difficult
best_for: Oregon residents in the Portland or Salem area shopping for a used vehicle with dealer-arranged financing
Spanish-speaking consumers who need bilingual dealership support
Vehicle owners looking to trade in, sell outright, or consign their current car
Buyers who want sales, service, and collision repair handled at a single dealership
diagnosis: Freeman Motor Company is best suited for Oregon consumers who want to buy a used vehicle and arrange financing in one place, particularly Spanish speakers or buyers in the Portland/Salem metro area. The key caveat is that this is a car dealership, not a financial institution — CreditDoc users seeking a standalone personal loan should look elsewhere, and anyone using Freeman's financing should independently compare loan terms before signing.
services: Dealer-arranged auto financing via credit application
Online payment calculator for monthly cost estimates
Sell My Car — outright vehicle purchase from consumers
